title: megalastrum angustum
intro: Megalastrum angustum, a species of fern belonging to the family Osmundaceae, is a type of vascular plant that grows in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Megalastrum angustum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
